## Checklist

- [ ] Tested on **Windows** (ClickRAX is Windows-only)
- [ ] No secrets in the diff (`config.json`, `*.dpapi`, PBS tokens, passwords, internal URLs)
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes (or N/A for docs-only)
- [ ] User-facing text updated in **EN** and **RU** if applicable
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-visible changes (or N/A)
